untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Keltner Channels or equivalent high-low range bands around moving average. The ALLOWED_INDICATORS list does not include a direct Keltner Channel indicator (kc_upper, kc_lower, kc_middle). Bollinger Bands use standard deviation, not high-low range. ATR could approximate volatility but does not directly provide band positions. Without the exact band construction methodology, the full signal logic cannot be accurately translated.
translation_notes: Translated the price-crossing-MA component using sma_10 (10-day moving average per parameters). Entry includes both crossing and directional confirmation. Exit uses reversal logic since AUTHOR_SILENT. The high-low range band component is untranslatable with available indicators.
